mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_NOTI_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO NOTIFICATION ( NOTI_NO, RECV_EMP_NO, NOTI_TYPE_CD, NOTI_CN, SRC_TYPE_CD, SRC_NO, MOVE_URL, READ_YN, REG_DTM ) VALUES ( #{notiNo}, #{recvEmpNo}, #{notiTypeCd}, #{notiCn}, #{srcTypeCd}, #{srcNo}, #{moveUrl}, NVL(#{readYn}, 'N'), SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT NOTI_NO, RECV_EMP_NO, NOTI_TYPE_CD, NOTI_CN, SRC_TYPE_CD, SRC_NO, MOVE_URL, READ_YN, REG_DTM FROM NOTIFICATION WHERE RECV_EMP_NO = #{recvEmpNo} AND REG_DTM >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - (#{days} - 1) ORDER BY REG_DTM DESC, NOTI_NO DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY t.REG_DTM DESC, t.NOTI_NO DESC) AS rn FROM NOTIFICATION t WHERE t.RECV_EMP_NO = #{recvEmpNo} AND t.REG_DTM >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), -#{months}) ) WHERE rn > #{offset} AND rn <= (#{offset} + #{limit})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NOTIFICATION WHERE RECV_EMP_NO = #{recvEmpNo} AND REG_DTM >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), -#{months})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NOTIFICATION WHERE RECV_EMP_NO = #{recvEmpNo} AND READ_YN = 'N' AND REG_DTM >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), -#{months})
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTIFICATION SET READ_YN = 'Y' WHERE RECV_EMP_NO = #{recvEmpNo} AND READ_YN = 'N'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM NOTIFICATION WHERE REG_DTM < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), -#{months})
mapper.select: SELECT EMP_NO FROM EMP WHERE NVL(ACNT_ACT_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND NVL(EMP_STAT_CD, '재직') != '퇴사' ORDER BY EMP_NO
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM NOTIFICATION
